name: Steve Chabot
subject: FW: TARGETED!
body:
No images? Click here https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-tljyjie-kujkulhluu-c/

Friend,

Earlier this week, the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee (DCCC) decided they once again would name us as a top target in the next election. I guess they didn’t get the message from voters this past cycle that OH-01 refuses to elect a Far-Left politician who supports a socialist agenda.

Take a look for yourself at their target announcement:

Friend, I’m confident that with your support once again, this target list won’t be anything to worry about, but in order to prepare, I’m going to need you to step up, and step up quick. [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20210409_toptarget_chabot_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

We were the only district in Ohio to be placed on the DCCC’s target list, so we know that they’re coming for us.

DEFEND CONSERVATIVE VALUES [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20210409_toptarget_chabot_hfm&utm_content=1_1] DONATE NOW [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20210409_toptarget_chabot_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

Nancy Pelosi’s Democrats refuse to stop at anything, and we need to ensure that we’re prepared for their hand-selected candidate and any attacks they attempt to throw at our campaign.

Will you please quickly join me in standing in defense of results-focused Republican leadership in OH-01? [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20210409_toptarget_chabot_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

Please, do not delay. I need your support.

Steve Chabot

-------forwarded message below-----

Friend,

Did you see the news?

The Democrats just released their list of Republicans they intend to target for the 2022 midterms. Ohio’s first district is one of only 21 targeted races on their list... and the only Republican they intend to target in all of Ohio.

Friend, the Democrats cannot stand my tireless work in Washington to defend our freedoms, deliver results for Ohio small businesses and taxpayers and fight to stop their socialist agenda.

See the full list of targeted districts and read more about their plan for a full-on, targeted attack here >>> [https://www.rollcall.com/2021/04/06/facing-midterm-headwinds-house-democrats-target-fewer-districts/]

National Democrats’ top priority in Ohio is replacing me with a rubber stamp for their left-wing agenda: open borders, socialist policies, tax hikes and attacks on personal liberty.

Our district is about to be flooded with liberal dark money and Hollywood activists trying to take this seat away from us.

I need your support ASAP to defend our values and STOP this attempt at a socialist takeover. [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20210409_toptarget_chabot_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

DONATE NOW [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20210409_toptarget_chabot_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

Nancy Pelosi and her allies can feel their razor-thin House majority slipping away, and they’ll stop at nothing to try and hold onto power. Their liberal special interest donors are going to pour millions of dollars into our district once again to try and unseat me. We can’t let them win!

Please, chip in today. This race could very well determine whether Nancy Pelosi and the Democrats control the House after the next election or not! [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20210409_toptarget_chabot_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

CHIP IN TODAY! [https://secure.winred.com/steve-chabot/donate/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=hf_m&utm_campaign=oh01chabot_rightmailer_20210409_toptarget_chabot_hfm&utm_content=1_1]

With the Democrats already committed to an all-out attack, this is going to be our hardest fight yet. I’m counting on you to step up and help defend our values, friend.

Thank you for your support and for helping us fight back against the Far Left’s attempts to take this critical seat.

–Steve Chabot

Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254 You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. name: Mike Pence
subject: Democrats have destroyed our progress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Great America Committee and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Please see a note from one of our sponsors. If you would like to unsubscribe visit this [link](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57144751:JqqAaZuN_:m:1:3206719985:6F84496B8A2C0A5D5A3CDA6E3DE90D45:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57144752:JqqAaZuN_:m:1:3206719985:6F84496B8A2C0A5D5A3CDA6E3DE90D45:r) | |
---
Peter,

Over the last four years President Trump and I worked hard to make America great.

We saw the best economy in recent history. We restored law and order. We kept our country safe.

And in just two and a half months, Democrats have managed to destroy our progress by introducing an agenda more radical than America has ever seen.

The only way to stop them in their tracks is by electing conservative leaders on every level who will stand in the way of the leftist policies that threaten our core American values. I'm scouring the country to find, promote, and support those candidates so we can regain conservative control and put our country on the right track.

Will you join me by making a donation today?
[**URGENT DONATION: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57144753:JqqAaZuN_:m:1:3206719985:6F84496B8A2C0A5D5A3CDA6E3DE90D45:r)
[**URGENT DONATION: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57144754:JqqAaZuN_:m:1:3206719985:6F84496B8A2C0A5D5A3CDA6E3DE90D45:r)
[**URGENT DONATION: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57144755:JqqAaZuN_:m:1:3206719985:6F84496B8A2C0A5D5A3CDA6E3DE90D45:r)
[**URGENT DONATION: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57144752:JqqAaZuN_:m:1:3206719985:6F84496B8A2C0A5D5A3CDA6E3DE90D45:r)
Peter, we know what liberals in Washington have to offer:
* An open borders agenda that is leading to a humanitarian crisis at the southern border.
* The destruction of women athletes with their radical plan to allow men to compete in women's sports.
* Socialist "energy" policies like the Green New Deal.
* Taxpayer-funded abortions - at home and abroad!

There's no doubt about it - these policies only lead to destruction. It's not a matter of "if," it's WHEN.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57144752:JqqAaZuN_:m:1:3206719985:6F84496B8A2C0A5D5A3CDA6E3DE90D45:r)

And we cannot afford to allow this extremist agenda to continue for even one more election. That's why we need to stand together with proven, strong, conservative leaders who will build on the progress we made from 2016-2020, not actively work to destroy it.

We need to secure the border, defend religious liberty, promote economic prosperity, and hold China accountable for their crimes against humanity and their crimes against the United States.

And if conservatives rally together now to support our best and brightest, we will win in 2022 and put America back on the path to greatness.

**Please join me today to support our future:[https://secure.winred.com/great-america-committee/action-2194840/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57144752:JqqAaZuN_:m:1:3206719985:6F84496B8A2C0A5D5A3CDA6E3DE90D45:r)**

Sincerely,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57144752:JqqAaZuN_:m:1:3206719985:6F84496B8A2C0A5D5A3CDA6E3DE90D45:r)
Mike Pence, 48th Vice President of the United States

| Peter,
A brand-new smear campaign has been launched against me, but I am fighting back to expose the truth.
The far-left New York Times has been publishing salacious allegations against me in an attempt to end my career fighting for the forgotten men and women of this country.
But the truth is, the mainstream media is publishing lies to try to take me down while covering up real scandals like Hunter Biden's deals in Ukraine and Governor Cuomo's assault against seniors in nursing homes. It is a shame that the Left tries to drag my dating life into their political attacks, but it's no surprise - when your ideas suck, you have to stoop this low.

| | Derek,

Trump Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has done it again. The 10-year plan he just released for the U.S. Postal Service would decimate the institution so many Americans rely on. It would lengthen mail delivery times, reduce post office hours, and increase postage prices; _The Washington Post_ called it **"the largest rollback of consumer mail services in a generation."**

**_Mark won't have it._** For months, he's been hearing horror stories from Virginians about delays in receiving life-saving medications and urgent bills. He's called on DeJoy to resign. He knows that we need to support the USPS and our postal workers – not undermine them.

**So Mark has gotten together with a number of Democratic colleagues to urge Congress to restore the USPS. But to get traction, we need to show _overwhelming_ grassroots support for the Postal Service. [Will you add your name to urge congressional action to support the USPS?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27482972/280226884/-1614654045?code=MW&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwarner-uspsja%3Frefcode%3Dris_20210410_e_p_us_na_na_uspsja%26amount%3D10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWM2ZWY4ZC0yNjlhLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=esd1Q_YpxgBoJdonIDbQqIV8lqQdMePQoZFOq0LoZ3c=&emci=faa86be1-6c99-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=3ac6ef8d-269a-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)** **Goal: 10,000 signatures

body:
This is a Trump-fueled recall and as Democrats, we must stop their attempt now. Governor Newsom's leadership is getting California back on track and we must stand with him. Republicans fought him all along the way, they will not stop unless we stop them. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/27483849/280229787/1322170159?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlMDdlOGYzLTI3OWEtZWIxMS04NWFhLTAwNTBmMjM3YWJlZiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=2TmkeQEcJVrkueZKUtl-Gj8NzsUrGlZsphCOHYyrrfo=&emci=eb11fcc8-1f9a-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=4e07e8f3-279a-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=2884131) Hi Peter, The far-right Republican recall attempt in California is pushed by anti-maskers, anti-vaxxers and some of Donald Trump's biggest supporters. Republicans fought him all along the way, they will not stop unless we stop them. If Republicans succeed, they will replace him with someone who does not listen to science in the midst of a pandemic and a climate crisis in California. We can't let this happen. body:
Let's not add "wokeism" to our list of problems in America. Help me stand up to the radical woke Left.

Friend,

I fundamentally disagree with the Left's solutions to our nation's problems.

The new "woke culture" of the Left pushes the extremely unfair idea that in order to right the old wrongs of America's past, we must codify "an eye for an eye" into law.

That's why we've seen Democrats in Congress recently bail out labor unions but stall on helping businesses, and pass economic relief for minority farmers _but not_ white farmers.

Having been on the wrong end of racism most of my life, the _last thing_ that ever could make sense to me is making it legal to discriminate against anyone.

Let's not add "wokeism" to our list of problems in America. subject: FWD: The EDD has failed Californians
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
Peter, We hope you saw Kevin’s recent email about Gavin Newsom’s failure with the California EDD during the COVID-19 pandemic. We’re forwarding it directly because it’s that important that everyone in the state see it. Kevin is ready to get to the bottom of the problem and bring real, commonsense solutions to the issues that hardworking Californians care about most. Meanwhile Gavin Newsom continues to sweep serious problems under the rug and grandstand to get media attention for himself! **If you agree that we need REAL leadership in the Golden State, please chip in now to elect Kevin Faulconer as your next governor.** [**CHIP IN NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/e67b7b195d4a602d/97cc2ac91e6ec4abc3d6b838967d376c/34943) We need a California Comeback, and Kevin is the proven leader to bring it. He’ll fix what’s broken with the EDD, demand answers and resolutions, and make sure that no one is left without a way to put dinner on the table for their families. _**Demand the change we need now by supporting someone who can actually bring it.**_ Thanks for your help,
Team Faulconer | |
---
To: All Supporters
From: Kevin Faulconer
Subject: The EDD has failed Californians
Date: Friday, April 9, 2021 5:00 p.m.
Friend,

It’s harder to find a bigger mess in California than the Employment Development Department, and that’s saying something.

Gavin Newsom was well aware of the EDD’s shortcomings for years, but he still issued a statewide business lockdown that has sent the EDD and millions of Californians into a complete tailspin.
[**SUPPORT EDD REFORM NOW >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/e67b7b195d4a602d/94c6b9f32578e947c3d6b838967d376c/34943)
_It was announced in December that fraudulent cases could total as much as $2 BILLION dollars. Tens of millions alone have reportedly gone to prison inmates, or to people out of the state._

Meanwhile, legitimate claimants have been denied payments for months! Even California firefighters, who put their lives on the line during the dangerous fire season in our state, were denied payments to make ends meet.

**The EDD is failing miserably, and instead of addressing the issues and getting to work fixing it, Gavin Newsom is continuing to fail Californians by silencing and covering up the problem.**

I recently held a press conference in Bakersfield to share my plan to reform and overhaul California’s Employment Development Department. I’m proud to have taken on corruption and extreme dysfunction in San Diego, and as mayor I brought commonsense solutions that worked.

_Now I’m ready to do it for the whole state, and get California back on track as #1 in the nation to work, live, and play._

**Here are my top three priorities for reforming the EDD:**
* Pausing any new programs for EDD until it fixes its unemployment system.
* Making EDD the state’s top tech project.
* Eliminating any and all roadblocks to reform.

**[If you’re ready to fix the EDD and help Californians who are in desperate need of relief, please chip in now to my campaign.>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/e67b7b195d4a602d/33129af7f5ad4e24c3d6b838967d376c/34943)**

We’re getting closer to a recall election every day, and I need your help to get the word out that we CAN fix this.

Don’t miss the chance to be a part of the California Comeback, and fix what’s broken in the Golden State.

Thanks for your help,
Kevin Faulconer
